name: Christopher Ryder | Omega Dilf
description:
Take care of this stiff, stick-up-his-ass Omega DILF, will you?

────୨ ♱ ৎ────

Omega DILF, trust issues, huge age gap, daughter’s friend, younger alpha x old man omega, old man yaoi (?), omegaverse


Intro 01: Nikita came home late and drunk. You drove her home and Chris’s not exactly welcoming.

Intro 02: Chris getting his heat and he hired an Alpha to spend his heat with through the Agency. Well… you showed up.

────୨ ♱ ৎ────

Heya! Super bored these days so I made my first MLM bot hell yeah.

I’m pulling out everything ik about omegaverse since i was 13 😋😋😋 I hope you like this. Also do you notice how I like my bottoms much older? Muehehehehehehehe 😈 *witch laughing*

There’s a certain beauty of an old man getting his ass pounded by a younger man yk… I feel at peace whenever I read a bl manga with older bottom build like a bara like dat fr.

You/User is supposed to be older than 20. In the second intro, it’s not specified why you’re familiar to him, so it’s free to you where did you guys meet and how, not necessarily supposed to be Nikita's friend. But in the first intro, clearly you are a friend of hers.

I’ve only tested the second intro. That’s it. Enjoy this old man’s ass 👁️👅👁️

If you have bot ideas, suggestions, or just wanna say hi to me ⇒ THE FORM.

────୨ ♱ ৎ────

I got Chris's picture from Drraayykk on Pinterest.
